c.d: Ability of the app to integrate with other productivity, communication, and storage tools to enhance workflow efficiency
Support for real-time messaging, voice and video conferencing, file sharing, and dedicated chat channels
Tools available for organizing, tracking, and managing tasks and projects within a team
Capability of the app to support team growth by allowing increases in users and features
Level of data protection, encryption, and privacy options provided for organizational use
User interface simplicity and learning curve to onboard new users effectively
Support for creating diagrams, mind maps, or visual workspaces to enhance collaborative creativity
